mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_request WHERE user_key = #{userKey} AND status = 'PENDING'
SELECT request_id, user_key, group_name, description, requested_at, status, reject_reason, updated_by_user_key, status_updated_at FROM group_request WHERE user_key = #{userKey}
SELECT request_id, user_key, group_name, description, requested_at, status, reject_reason, updated_by_user_key, status_updated_at FROM group_request WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY requested_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE group_request SET status = 'APPROVED', updated_by_user_key = #{userKey}, status_updated_at = NOW() WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
UPDATE group_request SET status = 'REJECTED', reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_by_user_key = #{userKey}, status_updated_at = NOW() WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_key FROM group_request WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
